# Archiet — AI-Native Architecture-to-Code SaaS
# https://archiet.ai | llms.txt v1

## What is Archiet?
Archiet transforms architecture diagrams and problem statements into production-ready,
multi-stack code via an AI-powered Journey Wizard and Genome specification engine.

## Core Capabilities
- Journey Wizard: 9-step guided architecture → code workflow
- Genome Engine: structured ArchiMate-derived specification (AABL format)
- Multi-stack codegen: python-flask, python-fastapi, nextjs, go, java
- Code Workbench: browser-based editor, NL code editor, test runner
- Compliance: ARCHIET_PROVENANCE.json, .cursorrules, CLAUDE.md in every ZIP

## API
Base URL: https://api.archiet.ai/v1
Auth: Bearer JWT
POST /api/journey/sessions — create journey
POST /api/codegen/sessions/{id}/generate — generate code (SSE)
GET  /api/codegen/artifacts/{id}/download — download ZIP

## MCP Server
npx -y @archiet/mcp-server
Tools: create_journey, generate_code, download_artifact, get_session_status

## Pricing
Free: 3 generations/month
Starter: 20/month ($29)
Pro: 100/month ($99)
Enterprise: unlimited (contact sales)

## Integrations
VS Code extension: ext install archiet.archiet
npx create-archiet-app <name> --stack python-flask
